ceeb45003d1e0e58.query: An under-the-radar research paper or preprint with a surprising or counter-intuitive finding about scaling laws, tokenizers, or small language models.
ceeb45003d1e0e58.why: A rigorous academic paper with surprising and practical findings comparing LLM pruning to training from scratch under controlled token budgets.
points: Pruned initialization consistently outperforms random initialization when training token budgets are constrained.
The advantage of pruning over training from scratch narrows and nearly vanishes at very high pruning ratios (0.8) or when the training token budget is extremely large.
Finer granularity pruning retains a knowledge-transfer advantage that additional training tokens alone cannot recover, whereas coarser structured pruning can be matched by training from scratch.
